artDirection: Neutral mannequin Character Lab option icons on flat black backgrounds, generated as 2x2 source sheets and resized into runtime atlas cells.

items.label: Preserve Original
items.visual: a mannequin portrait beside a small reference card, original style preserved

items.label: Anime / Manga
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as anime / manga style; Classic Japanese animation style.

items.label: 90s Anime (Cel-shaded)
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as 90s anime (cel-shaded) style; Hand-drawn look, hard shadows.

items.label: Modern Anime (Digital)
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as modern anime (digital) style; Sharp, clean, complex lighting.

items.label: Studio Ghibli Inspired
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as studio ghibli inspired style; Whimsical, soft, painterly.

items.label: Horror Manga (Junji Ito)
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as horror manga (junji ito) style; High-contrast, detailed, unsettling.

items.label: Action Manga (Akira Toriyama)
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as action manga (akira toriyama) style; Blocky, dynamic figures, action.

items.label: Seinen Manga (Takehiko Inoue)
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as seinen manga (takehiko inoue) style; Realistic anatomy, expressive ink.

items.label: 70s Retro Mecha/Action Anime
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as 70s retro mecha/action anime style; Vintage, bold designs, film grain.

items.label: Cartoon / Toon
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as cartoon / toon style; Simplified shapes, bold outlines.

items.label: American Comic Book
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as american comic book style; Dynamic poses, strong inks.

items.label: Vintage Comic (1960s)
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as vintage comic (1960s) style; Ben-Day dots, limited colors.

items.label: Graphic Novel / Noir
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as graphic novel / noir style; High-contrast, gritty, cinematic.

items.label: Chibi
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as chibi style; Cute, oversized heads, simplified bodies.

items.label: Vector Art
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as vector art style; Clean lines, flat colors, geometric.

items.label: Flat Design
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as flat design style; Minimalist, clean, simple shapes.

items.label: Psychedelic Art
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as psychedelic art style; Distorted visuals, vibrant colors, surreal.

items.label: Pixel Art (16-bit)
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as pixel art (16-bit) style; Retro console style, limited palette.

items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as pixel art (32-bit) style; Detailed pixel work, richer palette.

items.label: Glitch Art
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as glitch art style; Digital distortion, corrupted feel.

items.label: Synthwave / Retrowave
items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as synthwave / retrowave style; Neon grids, 80s futuristic vibe.

items.label: Retro 2D RPG (SNES)

items.label: PS1 / N64 Era 3D

items.visual: a mannequin portrait rendered as ps2 era 3d style; More complex retro 3D models.
